actions.expression:
SELECT ytfy.sid,
       ytfy.ytbh,
       ytfy.fphm,
       ytfy.chrq,
       ytfy.wxht,
       ytfy.cght,
       ytfy.htrq,
       ytfy.sqrq,
       ytfy.fktt,
       ytfy.sqry,
       ytfy.sqbm,
       ytfy.yjch,
       ytfy.sccj,
       ytfy.lxfs,
       ytfy.hyd,
       ytfy.tjjl,
       ytfy.jlhz,
       ytfy.sprq,
       ytfy.spyj,
       ytfy.tjzjl,
       ytfy.zjlhz,
       ytfy.sprq3,
       ytfy.zjlyj,
       ytfy.sfdy,
       ytfy.zwpm,
       ytfy.chsl,
       ytfy.hgjldw,
       ytfy.cz,
       ytfy.zzsl,
       ytfy.zsl,
       ytfy.bz,
       ytfy.ytje,
       ytfy.ywry,
       ytfy.cgry,
       ytfy.gdry,
       ytfy.lxdh,
       ytfy.zysx,
       ytfy.cwsd,
       ytfy.htxs,
       ytfy.kfdy,
       ytfy.ywdyjl,
       ytfy.sfdp,
       ytfy.zxpd,
       ytfy.ry
FROM ytfy 
WHERE (ytfy.ytbh=[电商预填费用.预填单号]) 
ORDER BY ytfy.sid ASC

actions.expression:
SELECT chyjhsheet.sid,
       chyjh.wxfp,
       chyjh.chyrq,
       chyjh.order_id,
       chyjhsheet.kpgc,
       chyjhsheet.gcdh,
       chyjhsheet.hyd,
       chyjhsheet.zhwbgpm,
       chyjhsheet.bgjldw,
       chyjhsheet.qtcz,
       chyjhsheet.zzsl,
       chyjhsheet.tsl,
       chyjhsheet.ywrya,
       chyjhsheet.ywry,
       chyjhsheet.gdry
FROM chyjh,chyjhsheet 
WHERE (chyjh.rid=chyjhsheet.pid) 
ORDER BY chyjhsheet.sid ASC

actions.expression:
SELECT chyjh.sid,chyjh.chyrq 
FROM chyjh 
WHERE (chyjh.wxfp=[电商预填费用.发票号码]) 
ORDER BY chyjh.sid DESC LIMIT 1

FROM ywrybiao

actions.expression:
SELECT chyjhsheet.sid,
       chyjhsheet.zhwbgpm,
       chyjhsheet.bgjldw,
       chyjhsheet.qtcz,
       chyjhsheet.zzsl,
       chyjhsheet.tsl,
       chyjhsheet.ywrya,
       chyjhsheet.ywry,
       chyjhsheet.gdry,
       chyjhsheet.hyd
FROM chyjh,chyjhsheet 
WHERE (chyjh.sid=chyjhsheet.pid) 
  AND (chyjh.wxfp=:wxfp) 
  AND (chyjhsheet.sccj1=:sccj1) 
ORDER BY chyjhsheet.sid ASC

actions.expression:
SELECT ytfysheet.sid,
       ytfysheet.cght,
       ytfysheet.sqrq,
       ytfysheet.sccj,
       ytfysheet.zzsl,
       ytfysheet.zsl,
       ytfysheet.ytbh,
       ytfysheet.hyd
FROM ytfy,ytfysheet 
WHERE (ytfy.rid=ytfysheet.pid) 
  AND (ytfy.ytbh=[电商预填费用.预填单号]) 
ORDER BY ytfysheet.sid ASC

view.params:
SELECT wfgs.wfgs,wfgs.SID
FROM wfgs
ORDER BY wfgs.SID ASC

SELECT chyjhsheet.kpgc
FROM chyjh,chyjhsheet
WHERE   ((chyjh.rid=chyjhsheet.PID)
   AND  (chyjh.fphm=[电商预填费用.发票号码])
   and (chyjhsheet.zzsl>0)) group by chyjhsheet.kpgc

SELECT zx.cs
FROM zx
WHERE   (zx.ly="增值税率")

SELECT ywrybiao.yhm
FROM ywrybiao
WHERE   (ywrybiao.zw like "%单证电商%")

SELECT cyzglsheet.xm,cyzglsheet.SID
FROM cyzglsheet
WHERE   (cyzglsheet.zm="预填审批")
ORDER BY cyzglsheet.SID ASC

通过
不通过
待审批

SELECT chyjhsheet.cght,chyjhsheet.SID
FROM chyjh,chyjhsheet
WHERE   (chyjh.rid=chyjhsheet.PID)
   AND  (chyjh.wxfp=[电商预填费用.发票号码])
   AND  (chyjhsheet.sccj1 like concat("%",[电商预填费用.生产厂家],"%")) and (chyjhsheet.zzsl>0)
ORDER BY chyjhsheet.SID ASC
